overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character walking through a covered commercial corridor before boarding an elevated tram that travels through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night. The environment features neon advertisements, holographic billboards, and towering skyscrapers under a cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor toward the transit station

entered.detail: metal and glass ceiling structure with integrated lighting panels
illuminated red commercial banner hanging from the ceiling
transparent wall revealing greenery and plants outside the corridor
illuminated digital sign reading 'CONVENTION CENTER' in white letters

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial corridor with a high ceiling lined with red advertisement banners. Digital screens and a convention center sign are visible on the walls as the character moves steadily forward through the empty walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit tram moving through enclosed urban canyon

events.description: character boards the tram and the perspective shifts to traveling through the city
tram emerges from station into darker urban canyon with distant city lights visible through windows

agents.ego_description: standing inside the tram looking out at the passing cityscape through the front windows

entered.detail: metal and glass structural frame of the tram interior surrounding the viewport
large forward-facing window of the tram showing the track ahead
metal rails and support structure of the elevated maglev system
dark silhouettes of futuristic buildings passing by the tram

segments.scene_description: The character boards an elevated tram, transitioning from the corridor to a moving vehicle. The tram travels through a dark urban canyon with the transit track visible ahead and the silhouettes of massive buildings passing by on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit line through dense cyberpunk commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: sky becomes visible as tram exits the enclosed urban canyon into a more open area with cloudy night sky
passing large holographic advertisements and neon signs including a prominent blue humanoid hologram

agents.ego_description: observing the neon-lit cityscape from the moving tram, passing towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards

entered.detail: dark greenish sky filled with dramatic clouds visible above the cityscape
tall illuminated sign with 'WILDTek' text running vertically along a building
large blue holographic projection of a humanoid figure floating above the street
dense cluster of illuminated commercial signs and building lights
tall glass and metal towers with illuminated windows and architectural lighting

segments.scene_description: The tram emerges into an open area revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape under a cloudy night sky. The character passes towering skyscrapers covered in neon signage, including a prominent vertical 'WILDTek' sign and large holographic advertisements projecting blue light into the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined commercial walkway into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by following a character through a high-ceilinged corridor lined with red advertisement banners and digital screens. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts as they board an elevated tram, moving from the static walkway into a dark urban canyon flanked by the silhouettes of massive buildings. The view then expands as the tram emerges from the narrow corridor into an open cityscape under a cloudy night sky. Finally, the camera glides past towering skyscrapers adorned with glowing neon signage and large blue holographic advertisements, including a prominent vertical WILDTek sign.
